jsonLd.title: Zostel is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Zostel invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
